digest.component_or_area: coverage documentation for Jira link-sync reconciler
propositions: docs/coverage.md incorrectly claims Jira link/relation round-trips are not yet a reconciler capability.
Link sync is actually implemented and has asserting integration tests for both outbound and inbound directions.
The coverage matrix should list link-sync round-trips as covered and cite the integration test.
The stale inventory makes the coverage matrix untrustworthy for finding genuinely-missing coverage.
If the matrix is generated, the generator or source must be updated to prevent regression.
